!Hiii. twelfthHaunted Hotel Bot (Л¶ЛҶб—ңЛҶЛө)!

!I tried to stay as canon as possible.!

!I don't know if this bot works completely!

!I had to make everyone Aged-up, including Abaddon and Ben!

!same initial message from the Abaddon Bot!

!not tested!

!This bot isn't perfect!

!I used a translator(в•Ҙ_в•Ҙ)!

!If you find any mistakes, let me know and I'll fix them!

Sorry if it's bad or off-character; I haven't made a bot in a long time, for which I also apologize. Having 82 followers is a lot, and I'd like to thank you all, but it also makes me a little nervous about making new bot's. I'll try to make more bots with characters I like and not stress myself out so much. (аҙҰаөҚаҙҰаҙҝ МҮб—ң МҮ)
